content:
As titled, whats the preferred method of keeping all your environments sync'd in terms of data, especially if its dynamic content added in a CMS.
Am I overthinking thats its literally a copy paste job, or get the content how you want in local and create a seeder? Anything better?
For ref, stack is php8 and mysql - so no frameworks.

  submitted by   /u/chit76
[link]   [comments]
